title: pelargonium × locusta
intro: Pelargonium × locusta, also known as Geranium or Mountain Geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × locusta are derived from its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds like geraniol and linalool, exhibiting antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of using Pelargonium × locusta include reducing anxiety and stress, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × locusta can be found in teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
